articles.title: SOL price soars after VanEck files for Solana ETF
articles.description: Solana (SOL) price rose more than 8% after news that asset manager VanEck had filed for a Solana ETF. The VanEck Solana Trust is the first SOL exchange-traded fund application in the US. SOL, the native token of the Solana blockchain, rose sharply on Thursday as the market reacted to news of VanEck filing for […]

articles.title: Solana jumps almost 10% as VanEck files for first US Solana ETF

Matthew Sigel, Head of Digital Assets at VanEck, praised the network and called SOL a commodity.Labeled VanEck Solana Trust, the filing comes after the spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) from the asset manager went live in Australia. articles.title: Coinbase says it will not facilitate Ocean-Fetch AI merger
articles.description: Coinbase said it would not facilitate the migration of two assets related to the Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (ASI) token merger in a June 26 statement. Instead of executing migrations for Ocean Protocol (OCEAN) and Fetch.ai (FET) on behalf of users, the exchange plans to continue supporting trading for each asset until further notice.
